promotion_reason: Continuation of C3 low-bank forward seam from pass 192. C3:2C00-2CFF frozen as mixed data (0 RTS/RTL, JML to invalid bank $A6, scattered JSR to unknown targets). C3:2D00-2DFF frozen as data with inflated score from byte coincidences (32 BRK, RTL/RTS bytes are operand coincidences). C3:2E00-2FFF frozen as structured data/table region (42/40 BRK, 14 RTI coincidences, repeating 00 XX patterns indicate tilemap/coordinate arrays). The BMI $2C01 from C3:2BF9 resolved to data rather than code — dead code path or never-taken branch.
